excel_description: A mechanism whereby the properties that collateralize the individual loans are pledged against all loans to the same borrowing entity.  It is a method used to enhance credit quality of the collateral.  For example : "X02-1" would be populated in this field for all related loans, "X02-2" would be populated for the 2nd group of related loans.

It is a method used to enhance credit quality of the collateral. excel_description: Y or N field, Trepp derived to determine if a property has been previously securitized.  If a multi-prop in a portfolio is marked with Y, the loan portoflio will have a Y.  For pari passu and split loans, only the first securitized piece or original loan will be marked with Y if applicable.
json_description: Y or N field, Trepp derived to determine if a property has been previously securitized. If a multi-prop in a portfolio is marked with Y, the loan portfolio will have a Y. For pari passu and split loans, only the first securitized piece or original loan will be marked with Y if applicable.
